name: Restore bun demo runtime to launch cluster with latest local code
motivation: The repository has demo lifecycle documentation and historical expectations for bun demo, but the command is missing and current local flows do not provide the same cluster-backed runtime/update behavior. This causes confusion and prevents contributors from using a one-command Kubernetes demo loop.
intended_experience: When a developer runs bun run demo, the script provisions or reuses a local k3d cluster, deploys the application from the latest local code, exposes a single reachable demo URL, and offers a watch-mode rollout loop to refresh cluster runtime after code changes.
constraints: Keep existing Plan and issue formatting rules.
Do not change production deployment behavior while adding local demo runtime capability.
Reuse existing repository k3d/dev topology where possible and keep prerequisites explicit.
